_comment: Day 1 selfie tightening — pass 3. Restores 'But it got me to think, I can do that' (the inciting motivational turn) but cuts 'It's on me' (redundant with 'outplayed on my own work'). Final speedup: 1.08×.

keep.label: opener: 'So this is day one of training an AI to be my video editor.'
'My video on X… outplayed on my own work.'
'But it got me to think, I can do that.' (the motivational turn — restored. 'It's on me' still cut as redundant)
'I mean, I'm not going to become an editor… for me.'
'So here's the challenge. 30 days, every edit…'
'Every post is going to be made by an AI agent.'
'And the only recording tools… my phone and my laptop.'
Outro: 'I'm packaging everything… DM you the link.'
